basic_details.job_title: NIT Agartala Junior Research Fellow or Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: JRF (Junior Research Fellow) or Project Associate-1
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology, Agartala (NIT Agartala) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology, Agartala has released the official notification for JRF (Junior Research Fellow) or Project Associate-1 posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: For JRF: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate / Post Graduate in Professional Course selected through National Eligibility Tests (CSIR UGC NET, GATE) or National level examinations. For Project Associate-1: Four Years Bachelor's Degree in relevant domain and experience/Master's Degree in relevant domain and experience or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology in relevant domain and experience.
qualification.details: JRF (Junior Research Fellow): Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate / Post Graduate in Professional Course. Selected through a process described through any one of the following: a. Scholars who are selected through National Eligibility Tests - CSIR UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE. b. The selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DST DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc. IISER etc. Candidates with relevant qualifications and experience in nanotechnology, expertise in the fabrication of nanomaterials and devices, will be given due preference. Project Associate-1: Four Years Bachelor's Degree in relevant domain and experience/Master's Degree in relevant domain and experience or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology in relevant domain and experience or from a recognized University or equivalent. Candidates with relevant qualifications and experience in nanotechnology, expertise in the fabrication of nanomaterials and devices, will be given due preference.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Junior Research Fellow or Project Associate

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Junior Research Fellow or Project Associate

category_wise_vacancy.Post Name: Junior Research Fellow or Project Associate

salary_details.details: JRF (Junior Research Fellow): ₹37000 (with 10% HRA) for GATE/NET/National Level Examinations qualified persons. Project Associate-1: ₹30000 (with 10% HRA) for non-GATE/non-NET persons.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Agartala JRF (Junior Research Fellow) or Project Associate-1 Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Agartala JRF (Junior Research Fellow) or Project Associate-1 Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: JRF (Junior Research Fellow): Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate / Post Graduate in Professional Course. Selected through a process described through any one of the following: a. Scholars who are selected through National Eligibility Tests - CSIR UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE. b. The selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DST DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc. IISER etc. Candidates with relevant qualifications and experience in nanotechnology, expertise in the fabrication of nanomaterials and devices, will be given due preference. Project Associate-1: Four Years Bachelor's Degree in relevant domain and experience/Master's Degree in relevant domain and experience or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology in relevant domain and experience or from a recognized University or equivalent. Candidates with relevant qualifications and experience in nanotechnology, expertise in the fabrication of nanomaterials and devices, will be given due preference.

NIT Agartala JRF (Junior Research Fellow) or Project Associate-1 Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Agartala JRF (Junior Research Fellow) or Project Associate-1 Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Agartala JRF (Junior Research Fellow) or Project Associate-1 Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Agartala JRF/Project Associate-1 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 22-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authorities before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for the JRF post?
faq.answer: For the JRF position, the salary is ₹37000 per month, which includes a 10% House Rent Allowance (HRA), provided the candidate is qualified through GATE/NET or equivalent national-level examinations.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Project Associate-1 position?
faq.answer: For Project Associate-1, candidates need a Four Years Bachelor's Degree in a relevant domain with experience, or a Master's Degree in a relevant domain with experience, or a Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology in a relevant domain with experience.

faq.question: Q4. How will the selection be made for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for both JRF and Project Associate-1 positions will be based on an interview, which will be conducted in a hybrid mode, allowing for both online and offline participation.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Junior Research Fellow or Project Associate in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates are required to apply through email. The complete application form along with necessary documents should be sent to the specified email addresses.

faq.question: Q8. What is the date of the interview?
faq.answer: The interview for the shortlisted candidates will be held on 24-07-2026. This interview will be conducted in a hybrid mode, accommodating both online and offline attendees.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of NIT Agartala?
faq.answer: The official website of the National Institute of Technology, Agartala is www.nita.ac.in. Candidates can visit this website for more information and updates.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific preferences for candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with relevant qualifications and experience in nanotechnology, particularly in the fabrication of nanomaterials and devices, will be given due preference for both the JRF and Project Associate-1 positions.
